{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/62334214?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kyo-w", "id": 62334214, "login": "kyo-w", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYyMzM0MjE0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kyo-w", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44342", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

The email and WeChat account binding endpoints used GET requests for state-changing account operations. In deployments where session cookies could be sent on cross-site navigations, an attacker could trigger a logged-in user's browser to bind an attacker-controlled email address or OAuth identity.

Affected endpoints included:

- `GET /api/oauth/email/bind`
- `GET /api/oauth/wechat/bind`

## Impact

A successful attack could change account binding state. For email binding, the attacker could bind an email address they control and then attempt follow-on account recovery flows. The default session cookie configuration uses `SameSite=Strict`, which mitigates common cross-site navigation attacks in modern browsers, so the issue is rated Medium.

## Affected versions

Versions before `v0.12.0-alpha.1` are affected.

## Patches

This issue is fixed in `v0.12.0-alpha.1`. The fix changes email and WeChat binding routes from GET to POST and reads parameters from a JSON request body instead of query parameters. The same change set also normalizes password reset responses to avoid disclosing whether an email is registered.

## Workarounds

If upgrading immediately is not possible, ensure session cookies are configured with strict SameSite behavior and block GET requests to `/api/oauth/email/bind` and `/api/oauth/wechat/bind` at the reverse proxy.

## Resources

- Fixed by commit `e099117c61391abdf888fb75e382a582e550bd0e`.
- Relevant code paths: `router/api-router.go` and `controller/user.go`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00189, "percentile": 0.08665}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T13:01:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44342"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-07T13:01:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api/security/advisories/GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m", "https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api/commit/e099117c61391abdf888fb75e382a582e550bd0e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/QuantumNous/new-api/security-advisories/GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api", "summary": "New API is vulnerable to CSRF through user email binding", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T13:01:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-26v7-h57m-gh9m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.12.0-alpha.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/QuantumNous/new-api"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.12.0-alpha.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: New API is vulnerable to CSRF through user email binding
